title: Pls Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function Pls (JointNumber As Integer ) As Integer
parameters: JointNumber	The specific joint for which to get the current encoder pulse count.
description: Returns the current encoder pulse count for each joint at the current position.
see_also:
Agl

Pulse

Pls Example

VB Example:

j1pulses = m_spel.Pls(1)

C# Example:

j1pulses = m_spel.Pls(1);
